title: Now .. this is NOT OKAY!
content:
I came across these two links on the USENET newsgroup -- which claiming that a restaurant in Philadelphia is doing something w/ the King's (yes, our King) photo. So I decided to drop by to see what happens. And ... see for yourself.

[url]http://citypaper.net/articles/current/pretzel.shtml[/url]
[url]http://story.news.yahoo.com/news?tmpl=story&u=/020629/168/1rshk.html[/url]
[url]http://asia.cnn.com/2002/WORLD/asiapcf/southeast/06/29/thai.king.ap/index.html[/url]

The owner of the restaurant still insists that she will continue running the ad, but she'll put in some sort of disclaimer saying that "this ad is a parody and that we don't mean to offend anyone".

Stupid B**CH! (oooppppps)
